Number Input

Numeric input field with optional stepper controls using <lyte-number> Slyte DOM. Supports inline and stacked steppers, validation states, and disabled mode.

Form Figma Synced 6 States × 2 Stepper Variants
Default — Empty Number Input
Base
With Min/Max
HTML
<!-- Lyte Number — Default empty -->
<lyte-number lt-prop-placeholder="0" lt-prop-label="Quantity" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>

<!-- With min/max -->
<lyte-number lt-prop-placeholder="0" lt-prop-label="Amount" lt-prop-min="0" lt-prop-max="1000" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>
SCSS
/* lyte-number renders: .lyteField > input[type="text"] */
lyte-number .lyteField {
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
}
lyte-number .lyteField input {
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
}
Filled — With Value
Numeric Value
Decimal Value
HTML
<lyte-number lt-prop-value="42" lt-prop-label="Quantity" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>

<!-- Decimal -->
<lyte-number lt-prop-value="99.95" lt-prop-label="Price" lt-prop-step="0.01" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>
Disabled — Non-interactive
Disabled Empty
Disabled Filled
HTML
<lyte-number lt-prop-placeholder="0" lt-prop-label="Quantity" lt-prop-disabled="true" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>

<lyte-number lt-prop-value="7" lt-prop-label="Quantity" lt-prop-disabled="true" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>
SCSS
lyte-number[lt-prop-disabled="true"] .lyteField {
  background: #F5F5F5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
}
Error — Validation Failed
Error
Error Empty
HTML
<!-- lyte-number has built-in error support via lt-prop-error -->
<lyte-number lt-prop-value="-5" lt-prop-label="Quantity" lt-prop-error="true" lt-prop-default-error-message="Value must be a positive number" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>

<lyte-number lt-prop-placeholder="0" lt-prop-label="Required Field" lt-prop-mandatory="true" lt-prop-error="true" lt-prop-default-error-message="This field is required" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>
SCSS
lyte-number .lyteNumberErrorMessage {
  color: #CC1914;
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
  margin-top: 4px;
}
Stepper — Stacked Right (Controls)
Default
With Min/Max
Disabled
HTML
<!-- lt-prop-controls adds up/down arrow buttons -->
<lyte-number lt-prop-value="1" lt-prop-label="Quantity" lt-prop-controls="true" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>

<!-- With min/max range -->
<lyte-number lt-prop-value="25" lt-prop-label="Items" lt-prop-controls="true" lt-prop-min="0" lt-prop-max="100" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>

<!-- Disabled with controls -->
<lyte-number lt-prop-value="3" lt-prop-label="Count" lt-prop-controls="true" lt-prop-disabled="true" lt-prop-appearance="box"></lyte-number>
SCSS
/* lyte-number renders: .lyteNumberArrowContainer > .lyteNumberUpArrow + .lyteNumberDownArrow */
lyte-number .lyteNumberArrowContainer {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  border-left: 1px solid #D5D6D9;
  height: 100%;
}
lyte-number .lyteNumberUpArrow,
lyte-number .lyteNumberDownArrow {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex: 1;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #696C74;
}
lyte-number .lyteNumberUpArrow:hover,
lyte-number .lyteNumberDownArrow:hover { background: #E4E5E8; }
Stepper Inline — Left/Right Buttons (Custom HTML)
Default
Disabled
HTML
<!-- Inline stepper: Custom HTML (no lyte-number equivalent for horizontal +/- buttons) -->
<div class="zc-number-field">
  <label class="zc-number-label">Quantity</label>
  <div class="zc-number-wrapper zc-number-inline">
    <button class="zc-number-step-down"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></button>
    <input class="zc-number-input" type="number" value="5" />
    <button class="zc-number-step-up"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-number-inline .zc-number-step-down,
.zc-number-inline .zc-number-step-up {
  width: 36px;
  height: 100%;
  flex: none;
  font-size: 12px;
}
.zc-number-inline .zc-number-input { text-align: center; }
